Values.RESOURCE_GRAPH_QUERY: resources | where type == 'microsoft.azurearcdata/sqlserverinstances' | extend machineId = tolower(tostring(properties.containerResourceId)) | project machineId | distinct machineId | join kind=inner (resources | where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines' | where properties.status == 'Connected' | project id=tolower(id), name, resourceGroup, subscriptionId, location, tags) on $left.machineId == $right.id | project name, resourceGroup, subscriptionId, location, tags
